requirements.summary: Preserve deterministic create-execplan orchestration and final artifact model.
Keep each child phase to a single fresh worker subagent with no nested planning or child-agent orchestration.
Validate the isolation rule with repo-local regression checks and installed-skill acceptance.

sources.title: Phase controller
sources.trust_rationale: Canonical phase controller and prompt/schema source.

sources.title: Skill parent/worker contract
sources.trust_rationale: Canonical parent and worker orchestration contract.

sources.title: Helper regression checks
sources.trust_rationale: Regression harness for prepare/apply and worker packet behavior.

sources.title: Mock repro findings
sources.trust_rationale: Summarized evidence from the end-to-end mock reproduction.

notes: The first live reproduction failed on invalid_json_schema because blockingIssues was omitted from the schema required list.
The second live reproduction invoked spawn_agent inside the child requirements-freeze phase before the parent/worker redesign landed.
Helper checks passed after the controller refactor and the installed-skill live acceptance flow replaced the subprocess smoke.
